summary: Strong script: set -euo pipefail, proper quoting, comprehensive input validation, glob-to-regex conversion correct. Workflow follows best practices (pinned actions@v4, minimal permissions, syntax validation via shellcheck). Minor: workflow assumes fixtures/labels.conf and fixtures/files.txt exist on push/pull_request without defensive checks (lines 59-71); should either create fixtures dynamically or skip step if missing. Overall: solid, ship-ready given required fixture files.
